package rulecoverage

func NegativeTypeSwitchVsRepeatedAssertions() string {
    ruleID := "type_switch_vs_repeated_assertions"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "multiple sequential `if _, ok := i.(T1); ok { ... } else if _, ok := i.(T2); ok { ... }` patterns"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
